history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, overhead shot captures two young people lying down in dry, golden grass under bright, natural sunlight. The person on the left, wearing a black beanie with "ARC'TERYX" subtly visible, sunglasses, and a black long-sleeved shirt with a vest, rests their head on the shoulder of the person on the right. Their eyes are closed, and their expression is serene. The person on the right, wearing a camouflage beanie and a dark puffer jacket, has their eyes partially closed, with their face turned towards the camera. A large black backpack rests behind them, with a water bottle attached to the side. The lighting is harsh, creating strong shadows and highlighting the textures of the grass and clothing. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones of brown, gold, and dark green, with accents of black and white. The overall mood is one of peaceful rest and perhaps a shared moment of repose during an outdoor adventure. The style is candid and intimate, with a slightly vintage or lo-fi aesthetic due to the image quality.
